translations.en: We're saying goodbye at the platform.
translations.fr: On se dit au revoir sur le quai.
translations.pt: A gente se despede na plataforma.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tạm biệt nhau ở sân ga.
translations.nl: We nemen afscheid op het perron.
translations.hi: हम प्लेटफ़ॉर्म पर अलविदा कहते हैं.
translations.ja: ホームでお別れします。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural nominative pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 1st pl); forms a light-verb collocation with 'Abschied' meaning 'to take leave'.
Count noun (masc.); direct object of 'nehmen' in the fixed expression 'Abschied nehmen' (accusative singular).
Preposition (contraction of 'an dem') selecting dative; introduces a locative PP.
Noun (masc.); object of the preposition 'am' in dative singular; locative complement.

sentences.target: Ich umarme sie zum Abschied vor der Tür.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ʊmˈaʁmə ziː tsʊm ˈapʃiːt foːɐ̯ deːɐ̯ tyːɐ̯/

translations.de: Ich umarme sie zum Abschied vor der Tür.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ʊmˈaʁmə ziː tsʊm ˈapʃiːt foːɐ̯ deːɐ̯ tyːɐ̯/
translations.en: I hug her goodbye at the door.
translations.es: La abrazo para despedirme en la puerta.
translations.fr: Je la serre contre moi pour lui dire au revoir devant la porte.
translations.it: La abbraccio per salutarla alla porta.
translations.ko: 문 앞에서 그녀를 껴안고 작별 인사를 해요.
translations.yue: 我喺門口摟住佢講再見。
translations.ru: Я обнимаю её у двери на прощание.
translations.pt: Eu a abraço na porta para me despedir.
translations.he: אני מחבק אותה ליד הדלת כדי להיפרד.
translations.vi: Tôi ôm cô ấy để tạm biệt ở cửa.
translations.nl: Ik omhels haar bij de deur om afscheid te nemen.
translations.uk: Я обіймаю її біля дверей на прощання.
translations.hi: मैं दरवाज़े पर उसे गले लगाकर अलविदा कहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Przy drzwiach przytulam ją na pożegnanie.
translations.el: Την αγκαλιάζω για να την αποχαιρετήσω στην πόρτα.
translations.nb: Jeg gir henne en klem i døra for å si farvel.
translations.id: Aku memeluknya di depan pintu untuk berpamitan.
translations.sv: Jag kramar henne vid dörren för att säga hej då.
translations.ro: O îmbrățișez la ușă ca să îmi iau rămas-bun.
translations.cs: U dveří ji obejmu na rozloučenou.
translations.da: Jeg giver hende et kram ved døren for at sige farvel.
translations.ja: 玄関で彼女を抱きしめてお別れする。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative pronoun; subject.
Finite main verb (present, 1st sg); transitive.
3rd-person pronoun; direct object in accusative (singular feminine or plural, context-ambiguous).
Preposition (contraction of 'zu dem') selecting dative; forms an adverbial PP expressing occasion/purpose ('zum Abschied').
Noun (masc.); object of 'zum' in dative singular; PP denotes the occasion ('at parting').
Preposition selecting dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article; dative feminine singular agreeing with 'Tür'.
Noun (fem.); object of the preposition 'vor' in dative singular; locative complement.

sentences.target: Er schreibt zum Abschied eine kleine Karte.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ʃraɪ̯pt tsʊm ˈapʃiːt ˈaɪ̯nə ˈklaɪ̯nə ˈkaʁtə/

translations.de: Er schreibt zum Abschied eine kleine Karte.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ʃraɪ̯pt tsʊm ˈapʃiːt ˈaɪ̯nə ˈklaɪ̯nə ˈkaʁtə/
translations.en: He writes a small card to say goodbye.
translations.es: Él escribe una tarjeta pequeña para despedirse.
translations.fr: Il écrit une petite carte pour dire au revoir.
translations.ko: 그는 작별 인사를 전하려고 작은 카드에 글을 씁니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他写一张小卡片来告别。
translations.ru: Он пишет маленькую открытку, чтобы попрощаться.
translations.pt: Ele escreve um cartãozinho para se despedir.
translations.he: הוא כותב כרטיס קטן כדי להיפרד.
translations.tr: Veda etmek için küçük bir kart yazıyor.
translations.vi: Anh ấy viết một tấm thiệp nhỏ để tạm biệt.
translations.nl: Hij schrijft een klein kaartje om afscheid te nemen.
translations.uk: Він пише маленьку листівку, щоб попрощатися.
translations.hu: Ír egy kis कártyát, hogy elbúcsúzzon.
translations.hi: वह विदा कहने के लिए एक छोटा कार्ड लिखता है.
translations.el: Γράφει μια μικρή κάρτα για να αποχαιρετήσει.
translations.nb: Han skriver et lite kort for å ta farvel.
translations.id: Dia menulis sebuah kartu kecil untuk berpamitan.
translations.sv: Han skriver ett litet kort för att ta farväl.
translations.ro: El scrie un bilețel mic ca să își ia rămas-bun.
translations.da: Han skriver et lille kort for at sige farvel.
translations.fi: Hän kirjoittaa pienen kortin hyvästejä varten.
translations.ja: 彼はお別れのために小さなカードを書く。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular nominative pronoun; subject.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd sg); transitive.
Preposition (contraction of 'zu dem') selecting dative; adverbial PP marking occasion ('as a farewell').
Noun (masc.); object of 'zum' in dative singular; PP modifies the action.
Indefinite article; accusative feminine singular marking the direct object 'Karte'.
Attributive adjective; agrees with 'Karte' (accusative feminine singular).
Noun (fem.); direct object in accusative singular.

sentences.target: Der Abschied fällt mir heute richtig schwer.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈapʃiːt fɛlt miːɐ̯ ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈʁɪçtɪç ʃveːɐ̯/

translations.de: Der Abschied fällt mir heute richtig schwer.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈapʃiːt fɛlt miːɐ̯ ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈʁɪçtɪç ʃveːɐ̯/
translations.en: The farewell feels really hard today.
translations.es: Hoy despedirme se me hace muy difícil.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je trouve ça vraiment dur de dire au revoir.
translations.it: Oggi mi è davvero difficile salutare.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天告别对我来说真的很难。
translations.yue: 今日道別對我嚟講真係好難。
translations.pt: Hoje é bem difícil para mim me despedir.
translations.tr: Bugün vedalaşmak benim için gerçekten çok zor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi thấy việc nói lời tạm biệt thật sự rất khó.
translations.ar: اليوم من الصعب جدًا عليّ أن أودّع.
translations.nl: Vandaag valt afscheid nemen me echt zwaar.
translations.hi: आज विदा लेना मेरे लिए वाकई बहुत मुश्किल है.
translations.pl: Dziś pożegnanie jest dla mnie naprawdę trudne.
translations.el: Σήμερα μου είναι πραγματικά δύσκολο να αποχαιρετήσω.
translations.nb: I dag er det skikkelig tungt for meg å ta farvel.
translations.id: Hari ini, berpamitan terasa sangat berat bagi saya.
translations.sv: I dag känns det verkligen svårt att ta farväl.
translations.ro: Astăzi mi-e cu adevărat greu să îmi iau rămas-bun.
translations.cs: Dnes je pro mě loučení opravdu těžké.
translations.da: I dag føles det virkelig svært for mig at sige farvel.
translations.fi: Tänään hyvästeleminen tuntuu minusta todella vaikealta.
translations.ja: 今日は別れるのが本当につらい。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular for 'Abschied'.
Noun (masc.); sentence subject in nominative singular.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd sg); in the separable verb construction 'schwerfallen' with the predicate adjective 'schwer'.
1st-person singular dative pronoun; experiencer/indirect object.
Temporal adverb; situates the event in time.
Degree adverb; intensifies the adjective 'schwer'.
Predicative adjective complement; together with 'fällt' yields the separable verb meaning 'to be difficult' ('schwerfallen').

Dziś pożegnanie jest dla mnie naprawdę trudne.
